Exercise 1.s: Last summer, I _______ (work) in a supermarket for three weeks.
Since then, I _______ (save) enough money for a new phone.
By the time my first shift started, I _______ (never / use) a cash register before.
It is worth _______ (apply) early, because the best jobs go fast.

Exercise 2.s: 1. Yesterday, we _______ (deliver) flyers in the neighbourhood.
2. This week, I _______ (work) three afternoon shifts.
3. By the time I got home, I _______ (walk) nearly ten kilometres.
4. The money _______ (pay) directly into my bank account.

Exercise 3.s: 1. Last summer, I _______ (help) at a summer camp for kids.
2. Since Monday, we _______ (plan) new games for the group.
3. By the time the children arrived, we _______ (set) everything up.
5. It is worth _______ (bring) sunscreen and water.

Exercise 4.s: 1. Yesterday, my colleague _______ (drop) a box of bottles.
2. This month, the shop _______ (sell) more drinks than usual.
3. By the time the manager came, we _______ (clean) the floor.
4. The broken glass _______ (collect) in a special container.
5. It’s important _______ (stay) calm in stressful moments.

Exercise 5.s: 1. Last week, I _______ (start) a job at a sports centre.
2. Since then, I _______ (learn) how to check people in.
3. By the time the first class began, I _______ (print) the attendance list.
4. The equipment _______ (store) in a locked room.
5. It is worth _______ (ask) questions when you are unsure.

Exercise 6.s: 1. Right now, I _______ (wait) for the manager to call me back.
2. Yesterday, we _______ (close) the shop earlier because it was quiet.
3. Since I started this job, I _______ (meet) many new people.
4. By the time the customers arrived, we _______ (already / set) up the tables.
5. If you _______ (forget) your name badge again, you’ll have to go home and get it.

Exercise 7.s: 1. Tomorrow, I _______ (work) the morning shift, so I need to go to bed early.
2. At the moment, my colleague _______ (train) a new student.
3. Last week, I _______ (make) a small mistake at the cash desk.
4. By the time the boss noticed, I _______ (fix) it.
5. I _______ (never / be) so tired after a shift before.

Exercise 8.s: 1. Usually, my job _______ (start) at 8 a.m., but today it’s later.
2. Right now, we _______ (carry) boxes into the storage room.
3. Since Monday, the team _______ (work) overtime every day.
4. By the time the delivery arrived, we _______ (finish) the inventory list.
5. It’s better _______ (ask) for help than to guess.

Exercise 9.s: 1. When I got there, the shop _______ (already / open), so I went straight in.
2. At the moment, customers _______ (try) on jackets in the fitting rooms.
3. I _______ (just / send) my CV to three places, so now I’m waiting.
4. Next Saturday, we _______ (run) a special sale for students.
5. If the queue _______ (get) too long, a second cashier will help.

Exercise 10.s: 1. Last year, I _______ (work) at a festival, and it was exhausting.
2. This week, I _______ (do) two shifts already, and one more is coming.
3. By the time the band started, we _______ (sell) hundreds of drinks.
4. Right now, the staff _______ (clean) the area after the event.
5. It is worth _______ (bring) a rain jacket, even in summer.
